---
about:
  template: trestles
  image: Sections/Home/GradPhoto.jpg
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 450px

toc: false

---
## Hello!

I'm Jonathan. Welcome to this conglomerate of things I've worked on or participated in. This website is a work in progress that I'll slowly be able to add to as I prepare projects for displaying. There are currently some items in the portfolio but more can be found on my github page.

In the time being please enjoy photos of my cat.
